name: reelgrep
description: MCP server for reelgrep - browse and search a local video library (subtitles, frames, person searches, exports) from chat. Read-only against the local SQLite index.

dbPath.description: Absolute path to the reelgrep SQLite index. Defaults to ~/.local/share/reelgrep/index.sqlite. Sets REELGREP_DB_PATH in the server env.
